overall.description: A nighttime drive through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city in Cyberpunk 2077. The camera navigates wet streets beneath an elevated transit bridge with red neon lights, passing industrial buildings, scattered pedestrians, and moderate vehicle traffic in a dystopian urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban intersection beneath elevated transit bridge

events.description: black sedan drives through the intersection from left to right
pedestrian begins crossing the street from left to right in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: stationary at the intersection, observing traffic and waiting for the pedestrian to cross

notable_agents.action: crossing the wet street from left to right through the crosswalk

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel overpass structure spanning the intersection
row of red warning lights along the edge of the elevated bridge
white striped pedestrian crossing painted on the wet asphalt
large illuminated advertisement screen mounted on building facade
tall pole with bright white light illuminating the intersection

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a rainy night intersection beneath a massive elevated transit bridge with distinctive red neon lights. A pedestrian crosses the street from left to right while vehicles navigate the wet roads. The camera remains stationary, capturing the cyberpunk atmosphere with artificial lighting reflecting off the pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with industrial buildings and concrete sidewalks

events.description: camera accelerates forward and turns right, following the street curve
green sports car drives past on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: driving forward along the wet street, navigating past the crosswalk and curving to the right

notable_agents.action: green sports car driving past the camera on the right side

entered.detail: low-rise concrete structure with metal railings and illuminated ground-floor windows
concrete pedestrian walkway with red painted curb
tall palm tree trunk visible against the dark rainy sky

segments.scene_description: The camera begins moving forward, leaving the intersection and entering a street lined with industrial buildings. The elevated transit bridge with its red lights shifts to the left side of the frame as the vehicle curves right. A green sports car passes by on the right, and the wet sidewalk runs parallel to the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial warehouse district with electrical infrastructure

events.description: camera turns left at the intersection, entering a new street
red sports car passes through the intersection ahead of the camera

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and continuing down the industrial street, passing pedestrians on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: person walking along the sidewalk next to the warehouse building

entered.detail: long industrial structure with corrugated metal walls and small illuminated windows
tall electrical transmission tower with multiple cable lines
vertical traffic signal showing green light

segments.scene_description: Driving through the warehouse district, the camera passes a large industrial building on the right and electrical infrastructure on the left. The vehicle turns left at an intersection where a red sports car crosses ahead. Pedestrians walk along the sidewalk beside the corrugated metal warehouse walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with overhead walkways and factory buildings

events.description: entering area with dense industrial structures and illuminated overhead walkways

agents.ego_description: driving straight through the industrial corridor, approaching another intersection with traffic signals

entered.detail: large factory buildings with glowing windows and smokestacks in the background
elevated pedestrian bridge with illuminated underside connecting buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle proceeding through a dense industrial area with factory buildings on the left and an illuminated overhead walkway spanning the street ahead. The rain continues to fall, creating reflections on the asphalt as the camera approaches the next intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a rain-soaked cyberpunk district, transitioning from a neon-lit intersection into a dense industrial warehouse zone. It begins stationary beneath a massive elevated transit bridge glowing with red neon lights, capturing pedestrians and vehicles navigating the reflective, wet pavement. As the camera moves forward and curves right, the bridge shifts to the periphery while the environment transforms into a street lined with industrial buildings and passing sports cars. The scene then shifts through a warehouse district, passing electrical infrastructure and corrugated metal walls before turning left at an intersection where another red sports car crosses the path. Finally, the vehicle proceeds deeper into the industrial area, passing factory buildings and approaching an illuminated overhead walkway under the persistent fall of rain.
